sections.title: The first time the player talks to Supervisor Lalo

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: I've not seen your face before. Given they let you come down here, I'm assuming you've been allowed to join the Alchemical Society?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right!

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Well in that case, just through there is the lab we use to produce potions for the kingdom. However, before you head in and get started, there's a couple of things to note.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: First, I can see you're not from around here, so I'll point out that Varlamorian Alchemy is a little different from the Druidic Herblore that you'll be familiar with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: We discovered that the majority of herbs in the world can be broken down into three alchemical reagents: Mox, Aga and Lye.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: When mixed in the correct way, these three components produce drastically different results. As such, in the lab you will be using these components to create various potions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What potions do I need to make?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: That depends. We get orders in from across the kingdom. You'll need to keep an eye out for what potions are currently desired and ensure you're making the right ones.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's do that run through.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Very well... Listen closely.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Start by breaking down herbs or unfinished potions over at the Refiner. This will give you your reagents: Mox, Aga, and Lye paste. The type you get will depend on the quality of what you put in.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Insert the paste into the Hopper and it will become available to use in the Mixer.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: From here, you'll need to pull the Mixer Levers to create the right combination of reagents.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But how do I know what the combinations are?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: I see you've already found our book of lab notes. That'll give you the formulas for our various products.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Have a look on the bookshelf for a book of lab notes. That'll give you the formulas for our various products.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: To know what needs making, you'll need to check the order list. There will always be three orders to choose from. You can work on just one or them, or multiple. It's up to you.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Just be aware that demand shifts fast here. Every time you fulfil one or more orders, a new set will come through.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Now, once you have set your desired combination of reagents, collect the unfinished mixture from the Mixing Vessel. This will then need to be processed on one of the three tables to finish it off.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: The Alembic will Crystalise the mixture.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: The Agitator will Homogenise the mixture.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: And finally, the Retort will Concentrate the mixture.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: After processing, place the finished mixture on the Conveyor Belt and move on to the next order.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I get an order wrong, or am unable to fulfil any of the orders?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: We always have need for spares, so fulfilling an incorrect order will still grant you a small reward and will refresh the orders.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: One final thing to mention... We have some Digweed growing in the lab.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: These rare herbs will occasionally come into maturity for a short period of time. Harvest them while you can!

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Mixing some into your product will increase its potency and grant you bonus rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bonus rewards?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: That's right. As you produce potions, you'll find yourself collecting three types of Resin. The types obtained depend on what reagents are used, with the quantities being determined by the complexity of the

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: potion.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Potions using Digweed will reward additional Resin, as will handing in multiple potions in one go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got it! So, refine herbs, deposit into the hopper, mix some products, process them, and then throw them on the conveyor. Seems easy enough!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure I can work it out.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Suit yourself. I'll be here if you change your mind.

sections.title: Talking to Supervisor Lalo after the first interaction

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you explain how to make potions?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Very well... Listen closely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have some rewards?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the Alchemical Society?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Can't imagine there's much to tell beyond what you already know. We exist to bring about advancements in Herblore, but in truth, a lot of what we produce doesn't directly contribute to that.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Instead, many of the potions we make here are simply to sell. Doing so is what provides the funding we need to further our true goals.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Makes sense. So how did the society first get established?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: For a long time, it was just a couple of us operating out of a makeshift lab we'd built in my garden. Our big break came when the Moonrise Brewery and Winery learnt about us.

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: They provided us with some initial funding to properly get things going, but more importantly, they provided this lab space. This was actually one of their old wine cellars before we moved in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why were they so interested in your work?

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: They never properly said why, just that they were very keen to see us grow. Maybe they're hoping our work can help them create new beers and wines.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I suppose that makes sense.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, I'll be going now.

sections.title: Interacting with any of the machines before talking to Supervisor Lalo

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: Hey! I haven't given you permission to do that!

sections.title: Receiving a tutorial from Supervisor Lalo

lines.speaker: Supervisor Lalo
lines.text: To know what needs making, you'll need to check the order list. There will always be three orders to choose from. Demand shifts fast here so every time you fulfil an order, a new set will come through.
